request: Make a graph or country wise orders
search_document:
User Request: Make a graph or country wise orders

Dashboard Components:
Title: Country-wise Orders
Type: chart
Description: Total orders by country
Title: Top Countries by Orders
Type: table
Description: Countries with the highest number of orders
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Overall number of orders

sql_queries.title: Country-wise Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipCountry, COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipCountry

sql_queries.title: Top Countries by Orders
sql_queries.description: Countries with the highest number of orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipCountry, COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipCountry ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
